CustomField.description: Fleet distribution from Flight Global World Fleet data, both in-service and on-order/option a/c. Note: so it can be directly referenced in Deals this field is limited to 255 chars, hence the a/c types with lowest representation may not be included.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Fleet distribution from the World Fleet data, both in-service and on-order/option aircraft. Note: This field is limited to 255 characters, hence the aircraft types with lowest representation may not be included.
CustomField.label: Fleet Size
